reviews.review_description:
It looks average and doesn't offer much else, but the co-op mode is an absolute gift! It is so much fun tearing apart bugs with a buddy! Five stars for that alone!

Edit: The co-op/multiplayer no longer works. That makes the game pointless. I bought it exclusively so I could play with my buddies. I can't believe that the most important part of the game can just vanish like that. This is already the third game to undergo this treatment. It is unacceptable! I want my money back.

As so many VR fail and have their servers shutdown so you no longer have access to it like Larcenauts.

These developers at least made this game single player now so you can at least play forever.

Not a very good game but still fun . Worth on sale for $10

Literally just another game that had potential but the devs have Literally done nothing with this game.... don't wast your money unless you want to play the same 6 missions by yourself... they have literally put 0 effort into anything additional to the base game no extra missions besides the harder difficulty setting but still the same missions.... it's literally the definition of a worthless game  they suck you In with the good gameplay just long enough where you can't get a refund....

Hi 

The coop lobby isn’t working which is unfortunate as this is why I bought this. 
The game itself is good if you want to play alone
No new updates for a very long time. Abandoned game , but it's still an ok game.
Good game for what it is. Fun and easy to get into just like the original movie.
Play it with a friend and enjoy, great fun for people who grew up watching the original movie and playing 8bit videogames

I really wanted to play this game. Couldn’t make it past the tutorial. Either it would just leave me standing there in that first area without moving on., it wouldn’t let me touch the gun to do the slide on manual reload, or the gun just wasn’t there on my back. I really wanted to play this game. I tried restarting the quest. I tried shutting it off and turning it back on I tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game and it was just the same issues. I tried a bunch of times. I re-purchased the game that I returned just to leave this review. I’m gonna return it again. I really wish this worked. I’m disappointed, but don’t waste your time or money on this glitchy disappointing mess. ￼

Bugged mission cant blow bug holes phase through walls automatic death sentence for characters please fix
i lost my character bc of your bugged mission

reviews.review_title: Doing my part for the federation- 10/10
reviews.review_description:
one of the
Coolest movies ever made …. now available to experience in VR . Thank you developers so much . I hope u make a tone and keep adding to this game with more
Dlc , stages and weapon mods : upgrades . 
I’m so happy they made this game … 
I just can’t wait for my gun stock controllers to arrive to use them for this  … best vr game out in my
Opinion ….
I’m really looking forward to muscle memory so I kick but more as it’s gunna be insane . 
Don’t sleep on this - support the developers if u like the game and leave a great review . 
Zero woke BS 🙏🏻
The only good bug is a dead bug . 

Add me if u want to survive .

This is one of my favorite games of all time because this is my favorite Movie of all time. After 25 years i'm so glad that we finally have a game. And I am extremely happy that there is a multiplayer coop mode.  now the only thing missing from it is a pvp mode for laser training, like in the movie. No live fire just lasers. Other than that, We're gonna fight and We're gonna win!

Starship Troopers: Continuum is a great VR hoard shooter. Offering a large arsenal of weapons to choose from that changes how you approach the arachnids on the field, as well as a ton of bugs to shoot.

The gunplay is my favorite aspect as it allows for both manual and automatic reloading on the fly, with both having Pros and Cons to them such as a damage bonus or reload speed respectively.

The focus on building a character with various perks that alter how you play, while needing to keep them alive until you can retire them for rewards or risk them dying, pushes a lot of focus on staying alive against the arachnids.

The main thing holding the game back at the moment is the large amount of bugs, specifically of the glitch variety. I’ve had bugs that failed to spawn in the boss, bugs that prevented stage progression, and even one that causes weapons to get stuck.

reviews.review_title: Why vr doesn't work for actual gaming
reviews.review_description: even the act of reloading is buggy frustration. You literally have to smash the the ammo clip into the gun to reload. I wanted to like this but its not worth it.

Jesus, reloads fail 4 out of 5 times!!! Drops rocket launcher, can't pick it up. Drops another on top of the old one and still can't pick it up. 
Boarder line unplayable, I got it for free with the meta plus subscription and I feel like I want my money back. 
2 stars as it could be good of the Devs sorted the glitches out.

I had a lot of fun with this game but it does not have a ton of replay ability once you finish the campaign there not a lot to do but I still like it and return to it every so often 


I did my part 


Will you?

So after figuring out how to fix the issue on the second level (wait until the flying bugs shoot at you first before you engage, otherwise you will be stuck on the level. Please fix this Devs), I was able to continue on with the game. 

First, the game absolutely matches the humor, if not more so, of the movie and the expendable nature of the soldiers. The complaint people have about the game not saving your progress when you die, is actually an amazing feature. 

So when you’re playing the game, you’re not playing as yourself, you’re playing as that specific trooper. You choose a trooper, they have a name, nickname, rank, career goals, and their path way to “citizenship”, which really immerses yourself into the universe of the game. It makes you care a little bit more about your current character, and it gives you incentive to stay alive. You’re allowed to deploy 5 times. But if you die, that trooper dies. They’re gone. They lose their gear, their rank, perks, weapons, and while that may sound devastating, they’re inexpensive at the shop so you’ll be able to buy them again with your new trooper. The only thing you really lose are your perks because the amount of perks and types are dependent on rank. So if that trooper dies, you’ll have to work your rank up again to get the specific perks you want. But again, it gives you more incentive to keep that trooper alive, and makes you much more attached to that current trooper. I’ve found myself yelling “No, Ramirez!” when that trooper I was using died. It makes it feel so much more like a meat grinder with the expendability of the soldiers. 

There are a bunch of missions, the Patrol game option has small spec op missions for you to choose from and you unlock them as you progress in the game. 

Online is fun if you can find a game, but it’s difficult to. But when you do, it’s a blast. You’ll watch your teammates get grabbed and shaken around like they did in the movies, but one complaint I have is there’s not a lot of gore. I know that’s a weird complaint to have, but the original movie used gore in a comedic fashion with just an utter abundance and ridiculousness of it. I’d like it if they’d implement that into the game. 

Overall, if you’re a fan of the movie, you’ll love this game. The bugs are giant up close and are genuinely pretty terrifying at times. It’s a lot of fun and matches the original atmosphere of Verhoeven’s masterpiece. 

But please fix the tech problems!

All the negative comments about losing everything when you die. Yeah the character dies but you are still at that level. I mean, cmon people died rather quickly in the movie. And it adds to your thoughts. Run on in or run away and fight your way back in. 
Either way, I'm doing my part are you?.

It feels like a cheap arcade game, it's relaxing to play. I love alien bugs in space, guardians frontline is one of my favourites.
Idk when this was made but the guns need work, when I'm using a turret it should feel like it! Heavy and slow moving, just having a little controller vibration is not good enough tbh. All the guns are like a paperclip or something nothing to them.
The bugs don't actually do anything either.
Of course the game looks good graphics wise, I've not tried multiplayer yet.
Only tried it out because it's on horizon +

THE WORST THING FOR ME IS THERE ARE NO SAVES come on devs!!! The missions are sooo long and when the game crashes or for whatever reason you pause playing, you have to start over again!! The least you could do is have the check points as actual save points in the missions!! I get fed up of playing the same thing over n over just get back to the check point and it's not even a check point

As of August 22 the multi-player feature is completely broken and the devs are not responding on the discord server about the problem. You can not connect with your friends, either in a private lobby or a public lobby.

This totally kills all functionality of the game for me.

I had to fight myself to give this two stars instead of one. IT SHOULD BE FIVE STARS like the title says because this is EASILY one of the absolute BEST bug shooting/fps games on the Quest 3. and that's a huge compliment cuz there are some mighty good games on here... BUT THE BUGS HAVE BUGS lol.

when they say this game has bugs, they're talking about the kind you shoot AND The kind that mess up your whole day, and I don't mean like the way the kind that you shoot do. 

I have had to quit SO MANY TIMES('virtually' EVERY time) because of a weird gun-reloading bug. reloading is very very integral to the game. I would say it's more, or just as, important than shooting in many ways. It's that kind of game, which is why I love it; but when you can't reload... You can't play. 

every so often it will have a glitch that will just first hold the gun up in the air and then the ammunition won't come out of the pouch & do anything right. 
only fix I know is to quit and that is not okay when you can't immediately save. So I don't play it now, and that's sad. 

DEV'S, YOU HAVE TO KNOW ABOUT THIS... THERE'S NO WAY YOU DON'T KNOW ABOUT THIS. COME ON, I WOULD EASILY GIVE THIS FIVE STARS!!!

I would give it five stars if it had more levels. Everything flows really smoothly and it’s really fun. Plus you could play co-op with friends or strangers and add to the fun. Really nothing negative about this game other than there’s not a lot of levels. You get a second play through on harder settings But like I said it needs more levels.￼￼

Don’t listen to the low star reviews. Yes you lose your character when you die, that’s the point. As you gain citizenship you’ll be given 20 Merits used to upgrade perks, new characters are new opportunities for better builds. I run a Dual Revolver secondary build and can blow through anything up to 5 star content without even trying, games not bad, your build is, read, learn, and adapt. Losing a character isn’t the end of the world, Armory will be stocked with new weapons every time you load into the lobby, or a campaign mission, sure you may not like your gun but you’ll fine one you do like quickly. My ONLY complaints are that there’s not enough content, New Game Plus should have new collectibles, and there needs to be better server stability. Also you’re not guaranteed to always die, I haven’t had a character die in over a week Overall 4/5

Typical shoot em up, lots of action, but the multiplayer experience makes me never want to touch this game again. Multiplayer is so extremely sensitive that any little blip will kick you out out of the server and then you’re starting the mission over from the very beginning. We tried for two hours to complete the first mission… If they would fix this problem, I would recommend this five stars. Just stupid fun action. But co-op is WAY TOO frustrating.

The servers have been down for days, making it impossible to connect with other players. Since multiplayer is essential to enjoying this game, it’s essentially unplayable. XR Games has provided no updates, no communication, and no signs of even attempting to fix the issue. They took the money but left players with a product that doesn’t work.

Do not spend your money on this game if the developers can’t be bothered to maintain or support it. It’s shameful and unacceptable. With this kind of business model and disregard for customers, XR Games won’t last long.

I love this game but it’s a complete inconvenience that you can get stuck on even the small rocks I can understand the bigger ones but why the smallest ones I just lost a boss battle on campaign+ because of a small rock it’s completely ridiculous.
If that gets fixed I’ll instantly give this game 5 stars

This game is probably the most immersive vr game I've ever played. It's difficult. You're gonna die so there's no point getting attached to characters. One thing is that some bugs feel weaker then they where in the movie (I've only seen the first one sadly). Warriors take 5 shots to kill, plasmas can be taken out by one soldier. That's a nit pick tho. Theres also a glitch where a sidearm wont holster correctly, which glitches your hand and doesnt allow you to reload manually, or acces key cards or levers. To those who say this game isnt solo friendly, i disagree. I play solo and im not that good. Run away, you can easily avoid attacks just by walking away. I'm doing my part. Are you?

reviews.review_title: This is THE Mobile Infantry Simulator
reviews.review_description:
As a huge Starship Troopers fan I LOVE the entire concept of this game, from the random troopers in search of citizenship to the Morita weapons and how they handle, and seeing some iconic characters like the Top Roughneck himself Johnny “Kill ‘em All” Rico in front of my very eyes.

Is this game perfect? No, but the sheer potential is remarkable. The thrill of the bugs swarming you from all angles touts you into their boots. So far the game performs well but still has room for optimization. There’s a lot of nice customization options.

Now, is death punishing? Yes, but the Klendathu death rate was also ridiculously high. What matters is that you do your part!

I would love to see more nods to the series like a scrolling death list and counter, and maybe a list of recently awarded citizens? And maybe a base defense mode with 6 players?

This is the worst looking game i have ever played on quest, dont spend money on this. The environments are sterile and flat there are no animations, the gameplay is just dull. Xreal need to ditch that stupid 1998 game engine this looks worse than zero caliber 1. The production of this game was probably only a week worth of coding, just another Xreal games reskin. Trust me its terrible.

Ready to play a great game with a fun storyline?! Ready to play a game with others only to glitch and throw you out, while not able to return without other players having to start over again ruining your progress? This is your game. You will enjoy the play, but then hate the game while wanting to scream at the developers for glitches that are quite sad and pathetic. #Dobetter #Dontdownload

Sad to buy this game as a gift for someone and try to encourage them to play more quest games….only to find this one. From what I’ve played solo, it’s a fun game so far and I enjoy it. Trying to play multiplayer with a friend….nightmare. We spent hours reseting the game, the headset, uninstall and reinstalling. We were only able to join 1 time over the last 2 days. We tried for about 2 hours each night to join each other and play together. Needs fixed ASAP PLEASE, or just offer a refund

I enjoy the game, but I get irritated on items, for example, the first mission.   It drops rocket launchers for you to pick up, but when you do, 90% of the time, because you're reaching down, you grab your grenade.   If they cleaned up a few mechanics it would be fun, but now, if it wasn't free with Horizon+ I would return it

This game is a blast. With friends it's on point for one of the best experiences you can find. It's a little buggy, and I don't just mean the arachnids. There will be some absolute tragedies in the line of service. It's undeniable, you will face connection issues, weapon malfunctions and occasionally you may lose your party. The risks are worth it to lead these pukes to Citizenship!

This game is absolutely amazing love that you can customize each and every character and the fact that you gotta be careful and not run and gun is a fantastic addition the audience you're aiming for is sure to buy this game finally able to try it thanks to quest+ but definitely worth 20$ I would even spend the extra 10 if it went there was going to be a part two love this can't wait to beat the game "kill them kill them all"  - admiral  reco I'm doing my part👍 are you🫵

These bugs have no idea who they’re messing with…
The customization, the hidden treasures spread across the maps, and the BUGS?! My GOD! THE BUGS!!?! There’s one thing for sure - I’m doing my part…the question is, are you? Take the training, soldier. Earn your citizenship.

So much good about this title. Then came the soft-mandatory multiplayer missions not scaled in the least for single player modes. Not a fan of the mandatory social aspects and soft-multiplayer-mandatory missions with so little for a single player experience at their own pace. Overall the experience doesn’t feel like it was tested adequately through various missions with various numbers of players.  Everything else about the game had me totally jazzed, so if you’re 100% social-grouping-compliant all the time, you may love this one.

Kinda gives helldivers 2 vibes specifically the bug missions, super fun and i really like the citizenship objective! things id like to see improved are map variety, like maybe procedurally generated maps just to keep playthroughs more interesting. And maybe some kinda extra end game content to reward replays.

Ok, I gave this a good review as it looks very good. But, I can't reload the weapons after the first shots. Very frustrating. I restart the game, get one load of ammo and then the cartridge doesn't click into the gun. It just floats straight through it. Not just fighting bugs on the game, but fighting bugs in the game too. Even had to restart the demo a couple of times at the beginning to get the weapon to load, then after reloading, the bugs are back, both the ones that kill you and the one in the game. Lol. I'm going to try to reinstall the game today to see if it fixes it, and will edit my review. Please fix it, I want to play !

An okay shooter that really wants you to know they got Casper back for Rico. Movement is either teleporting or free move which is super nauseating.

So far a lot of dead time between small fight sections. Mostly seems to have missed what made the movies and other games fun (swarms of bugs to shoot) and instead has you walking through corridors to fight spaces where a handful of bugs show up.

reviews.review_title: Don't listen to the skill issue 1 stars.
reviews.review_description: This is a fun VR game with decent gameplay mechanics. I played through this game on single player and found it to be relatively easy. The game is quite short unfortunately but with friends, it has a lot of replayability. If you cannot hold a gun then this game probably isn't for you...

So played this game via Horizon+ what is with
 the pick up mechanic? The first boss battle they chuck launches at you, some spawn in the bloody sky others you frantically try to pick up only to he killed by the boss because it took too 
long. This needs fixing and I shall update my review once updated

Charge into a bug nest, Morita and sidearm blazing, get overrun by arachnids and torn to pieces, then send the next citizen-hopeful into the bug grinder.  Reward your last surviving squadmate with citizenship, to return to Earth and breed the next generation of bug stompers.  Would you like to know more?

I have a lot of fun in this game. Now here’s a few things I would add and issues I do have starting with things I would add: melee weapons. We need knifes or even swords to the darn game, which would make it awesome. Something we should ad is an additional and singular AI teammate, just to give you a hand if you die. A thing I have an issue is recording. I recorded at least half an hour of footage, only to have ZERO sound, only mic audio and the game audio is on high in recording settings. That’s something that made me sad, plus I love the music of the game too which gives the starship troopers vibe. Anyways, that’s all I need to say! Just fix the game audio not showing up, thanks!

As others also wrote, the game is not that bad but the mechanics could be better. Especially the ammo boxes to open. In full action opening a box with your hand and waiting for while for the timer on it to open to is to much. You die in the action, just a button should be good.  Also that you cannot jump, many times stuck against a rock and cannot vgo further going back means i am dead.  So decent game just getting annoyed by some simpel to solve issues.

Update: the multiplayer is the best if you play single i would recommend go for direct multiplayer very good in this mode

Rather a fun game, I’m not to much of a fan though of losing all that character build up when you’re character dies then have to go build the next one up.
Multiplayer could use improvement. I only see around 15-20 players at any given time and only having a 3 man team versus 4 or even 5 rather stinks when the matches are full and no one else is open..
However the game IS rather enjoyable on your own and needs very little tweaking.

Looks like it could be fun but left-handed controls either suck, don't exist, or aren't available in the tutorial. Either way, i couldn't get past the reload tutorial despite following it perfectly... Or at least the game couldnt tell me how I was messing up!

If you love high action fun Starship Troopers kill kill kill intensity just like in the movie. Get ready to strap in and become one of the boys or girls. This game lets you live the film again and again. Awesome for fans and￼ lovers of first person shooter games ￼ alike. Would definitely recommend. ￼

Had this game for quite some time now months ! Still love it still play it more than all my other games definitely worth the money!! Hopefully they come out with expansions and more content! Can’t say how much I love this game. I’ve even got friends and family to buy the system just to play it. It’s multicultural. It never loses the feel of the movie if you were a fan. Can’t say it enough favorite game ever for the VR system. as far as movie based shooters!

Surprisingly fun in multiplayer with friends, but there were some problems. For example, one run I was completely unable to store and use grenades. Once in between sections I went to a black screen and never came out. My buddy got dropped back into the main camp. If these issues could be ironed out, it would be a huge improvement.

reviews.review_title: Fun but a few glitches still need fixing
reviews.review_description:
I love the premise and the psyc-commander mechanics. There are some rough spots in the game though and I’ve lost a few good soldiers with weird clipping issues.

Still, I love it and hope to see an expansion or something

The main disappointment is the 3 player cap. 4 would be way better.

This game is fun and with a graphics update and some bug fixes it would be great 

The games currently cartoonish and clunky I hope it improves though. Extermination got some love so I hope this one does too.
Great game with fun builds and lots of replay value. Losing a character is part of the challenge, but progression and new weapons keep it fresh. Needs more content!

reviews.review_title: Like playing the movie in vr!
reviews.review_description: I love this game, can’t seem to put it down. I do wish there were more missions and collectibles but only because I flew through it with my friends!!
Great game, a favoritte of mine.

Glitchy , The audio cuts out every other minute, and it’s not that responsive at times , 

They pulled the Psvr2 version because it wasn’t ready , they should’ve done the same with this version to

reviews.review_title: Great game, just needs some spit shine!
reviews.review_description:
Update: Multiplayer is pretty dead and without AI  teammates to replace human players, many missions at certain difficulty levels are pretty much impossible now unless you grind out max levels on everything…and good luck doing that without teammates.

If you loved the book and/or movies, you’ll love experiencing Starship Troopers in VR! The weapon feel is good and graphics are decent but not mind-blowing. There are some bugs/glitches but they aren’t game breaking that I’ve seen. There’s lots of potential and it’s highly playable now but it needs some TLC and polish from the dev team. The game starts off slow but ramps up. Solo mode (normal/hard) will challenge you. You’ll tell yourself that you won’t die easily but your mistakes will get troopers killed.
The game is honestly super mid, it’s a cool concept but the graphics are sub par, game play is pretty underwhelming not worth the price tag maybe if it was on sale.
You are forced to play with random characters. Story npcs suck, too.
Starship Troopers Continuum is that game you play with your friends when you don't want to do PvP, but still want action.

The game is pretty good. A lot of fun except its constantly disconnecting from the server and have to start all over every time. Played for two hours and got disconnected 3 times. Hopefully there will be a patch to fix this. Very frustrating.

This game is 
GREAAAAT

reviews.review_title: High Risk, 0 Reward.A Half Baked Game
reviews.review_description: It seems like the game is just banking on its IP (StarshipTroopers) for sales. There isn’t much to actually do, the only update the games experienced is “Private Lobbies” which should have came with the base game. The is little reason to actually play the game once you’ve played it one or two times, it’s just repetitive and doesn’t really reward players for anything but will take EVERYTHING if you die. I think it’s safe to say the community doesn’t like the Die one time and your done method. I’ve seen the devs respond to so many reviews where people are stating they dislike the one life feature, just for the devs to defend it. The community has spoken and it’s obvious this game isn’t going to last long.

reviews.review_title: A Cult Classic Come to Life
reviews.review_description:
This game absolutely nails the Starship Troopers vibe. From the moment you step in, it feels like you're in the movie—fighting side by side with familiar characters, revisiting iconic scenes, and getting swept up in that chaotic, bug-squashing action.

The weapon progression is super satisfying, and the different soldier classes add a great layer of strategy. Skill upgrades are well thought out, giving you a real sense of growth as the missions ramp up.

It's the first game in a long time where I genuinely want to play every single mission solo just to soak in the experience, and also team up with friends for the full co-op campaign. A real tribute to a cult classic, and an absolute treat for fans. Don’t miss this one!

Has anyone have any idea, how should we play multiplayer?
Even if I join to a Lobby, or my friend joins to mine, we are not at the same lobby. Can't start a game together, the host can click on start, but even if we are in the helicopter, can't see each other and can't start the game.. Both are horizon+ and quest 3.

reviews.review_title: Would I buy it? Probably not
reviews.review_description: As I got this on horizon + I thought I’d give it a go. My lad has H+ also so tbh we do have fun in a private lobby playing together when we CAN actually play together. It’s a pain to recieve invites, join when you do and then 50/50 whether one of us will be kicked and have to start over and NO SAVE POINTS? I mean come on, we’ve been saving games since 1990 on the NES. This should be involved 100%. Once these issues get sorted, if they get sorted it will be a fun game cooperative. 5/10 from me and tbh if I had paid I would be  refunding unfortunately
This game runs very good in my meta quest 3 no problem is excellent 👍 game

Movement feels sluggish even in teleport somehow. Turning isn't smooth either. I wouldn't recommend playing this sitting down even though it's an option. You cant reach your belt items and grabbing certain environment interactable objects like the turret has messed up vertical alignment.

I honestly thought it was gonna do well and maybe more
 content would be released eventually. I thought this about Gambit too.  But who knows

reviews.review_title: Love the game but too many bugs
reviews.review_description:
Kicked me out the lobby a few times and returned into the same location but with zero activity and bugs. 
New trooper (after the death of one) appeared right in the  bug’s tentacles. Which made it die in a second.

What an insultingly overhyped piece of garbage. Everything from the graphics to the gameplay is shockingly subpar. I remember VR review shills slavering over this turd before it came out, but I expect that from them. If you're a customer who actually played this and rated it higher than two stars, I feel sorry for you.
Australian players are unable to load into or host local server games. We can load into games hosted on overseas servers, but nothing local. This has been an issue since the 22nd August, not good.
This game was clearly made on a low-budget by people with little appreciation for the film.

I wish the game had a story campaign mode.
The game can be a little choppy there and here 
And the online multiplayer base is a little sparse. 
But overall, it’s a fun game to jump in and shoot and have fun. 
It’s a good rendition of the movie 
But above all else, it’s nice to have a shooter online VR game that isn’t about shooting zombies. 
Alien bug arthropods it’s a nice change of pace from zombies ￼lol

developer_response.body: Thanks for your thoughtful review! We're glad to hear you're having fun with the game and that you appreciate the alien bug enemies – we agree, it's a nice change of pace from zombies! We understand the desire for a story campaign mode. As for the multiplayer, we're always working to grow the community, so we encourage you to join our official Discord at https://discord.gg/8SNDvS5U to team up with other players. We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to make your experience even better!

reviews.review_description:
I thought this would be a stinker when I saw the early trailer, but the game is really fun. Graphics are actually pretty decent too(using qgo on my quest 3).
It's got the starship troopers vibe and is a well thought out and executed roguelite.
The guns feel really good and have manual reload mechanics similar to arizona sunshine remake. Shooting mechanics are surprisingly deep for a title this cheap. Hip fire and you move faster. Aim and you move slower (hip firing and aim mode are seamlessly integrated). This game is awesome and can't imagine what a blast it must be in co op!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! We’re so glad to hear that the game exceeded your expectations and that you’re enjoying the Starship Troopers vibe. It’s awesome that you’re liking the shooting mechanics and how immersive the manual reload system feels.. We agree, the co-op experience is a ton of fun, and we hope you get the chance to team up with friends soon! Thanks again for your feedback, and if you ever want to squad up, be sure to join our Discord at https://discord.gg/8SNDvS5U for more epic gameplay!

reviews.review_description: It's a fun game but there's more to be done, plus there's no way telling how to unlock top tier weapons. Also please add more weapons & game modes. Between this game and Starship Troopers extermination they're just really isn't enough weapons plus there isn't 20+ weapons it's just the one model in their variants.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're glad you're having fun, and we appreciate your suggestions. We hear you on the need for more weapons and clearer progression for unlocking top-tier gear.  If you have any specific weapon or game mode ideas, we’d love to hear them! Feel free to share your thoughts on our Discord at https://discord.gg/8SNDvS5U or reach out to starshiptroopers@xrgames.io. Thanks for playing, and we hope to bring even more exciting content your way!

reviews.review_description: Game is fun but when play with a friend one of us would always drop out for some reason never finish a level yet cause we have to stop and rejoin and restart the game that is something that needs work is the online multiplayer
You don't want to live forever,do you? You know the difference between a civilian and a citizen,a civilian doesn't have a pile of dead bugs in their garage,ahahaha. This game is a must
Not a very exciting game. A little boring and repetitive. Not particularly attractive graphic. Personally I couldn’t finish it.

reviews.review_title: No Saving Game Ferris Beullers Day Off
reviews.review_description:
The game looks beautiful. I kept the game because it is graphical. But, I've had the game for weeks now, and I played up to a few stages, and that's it... 30 plus minutes of play, repeating the same play, and the game doesn't save. 

I'm guaranteed to start over. I checked all the settings. So, for weeks now, I absolutely hate this game... I've been at it for weeks now; even if I cheat on it, I will hate what time I have wasted because there's no saving my progress. The game sucks.

developer_response.body: Sorry you're not enjoying the game. The levels should unlock as you play each, which would allow you to come back and choose which you wish to play the next time. Your troopers will not save if they die, as that is part of the game; keeping them alive until you retire them. If we've misunderstood the issue, please give us as many details as you can at starshiptroopers.xrgames.io. Thank you for reviewing the game, even if it is a 1 star. It's better for us to hear.

reviews.review_description: Listen developers, I'm a pirate, I demoed your game and after 2 hours of play I decided I liked it and bought it.  Good Job on this game, I hope you keep releasing more awesome games.

developer_response.body: Wow, we truly appreciate your honesty and support! It means a lot to us that you enjoyed the game enough to purchase it after trying it out. We're thrilled that you're having a great time, and we’re committed to delivering more awesome experiences in the future. Thanks for being part of the Starship Troopers community! If you ever want to connect with other players, feel free to join our Discord at https://discord.gg/8SNDvS5U. See you on the battlefield!

reviews.review_description: This game is one of the best purchases I've made. It brings me right back into my childhood. Now I get to experience what Dizzy felt first hand. 😂

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the awesome review! We're thrilled to hear that the game brought back those nostalgic memories for you and that you're enjoying the experience. It’s great to know you’re having fun and feeling like you’re right there alongside Dizzy! 😂 We hope you continue to have an epic time in the Starship Troopers universe. If you ever want to team up, be sure to check out our official Discord at https://discord.gg/8SNDvS5U! Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: I can play for hours!
